steps.title: Convert miles to gallons
steps.content: The van gets $32$ miles per gallon, so each mile uses $\frac{1}{32}$ gallon. Driving $d$ miles uses $$\frac{d}{32}$$ gallons.

steps.title: Subtract gas used
steps.content: The tank starts with $12$ gallons, and the function should give the amount remaining. Subtract the gallons used from the starting amount: $$f(d)=12-\frac{d}{32}$$ The answer is C.
